title: Laser Eyes
description: A "laser eyes" addon for the Viltrumite mod.
body:
This addon adds laser eyes to the [Viltrumite](https://modrinth.com/mod/viltrumite) mod. Players can fully configure the visual properties and strength of their lasers through commands. You can adjust the hex color, beam width, the distance between the two beams, vertical offset and the overall strength of the ability. 

Other mods that add laser eyes lack visual consistency due to complex movements the Viltrumite mod adds (actually any mod that affects the player model some way). This mod knows where your eyes are regardless of how your character is rendered on the screen :)

This mod requires [Viltrumite 1.0.5+](https://modrinth.com/mod/viltrumite).

![0](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcnhxYXRneHYxMGN3N3V3czYxMjV0d2VxOHZqMnY4dTI5eXZ2c2h4diZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Y7zQEeTdI8UJht64uV/giphy.gif)

![1](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNTB3eGN0bnEwY2VubWFxdnVweTI4aHFmZ3I5bzFjOTBnc2FlcmtvYSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/inPhiCZ4wzok0RV9DT/giphy.gif)

![2](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMWs1dWg0MGtjems1ODBoZHE3bHNmeG9hd2YyY2RiZW5qOGd0YjlzZiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qSQCTyCdKiqBtj8xWS/giphy.gif)

![3](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExbWZwazQ2ZTB5Y3I3NzJmeWM3amlmZ3M4c2Y1MXIzbnVkandzbWdiZyZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/36uoEjpVXZwUS34pvn/giphy.gif)

![4](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExa3VsZTcxaW13emdteDU2cHd3dmF2dXl3dW95NnZvNHliYXZrbm9hZCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/msn9Ije4hv2JTBYxT9/giphy.gif)

| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/viltrumite laser color <hex>` | Changes the color of the lasers using a hex code (e.g., `00FF00`). DV = FF0000 |
| `/viltrumite laser width <val>` | Adjusts the thickness of the laser beams. DV = 0.02 |
| `/viltrumite laser offset <val>` | Changes the vertical starting position (Y-offset) of the lasers. DV = -3.5 |
| `/viltrumite laser gap <val>` | Adjusts the distance between the left and right laser beams. DV = 1.5 |
| `/viltrumite laser strength <val>` | Modifies the strength of the laser attack. (Attack damage and block breaking speed) DV = 1 |
| `/viltrumite laser delay <val>` | Adjusts the delay time (in seconds) before the laser fires. DV = 0.00 |

_(DV: Default Value)_
